# Mark Galkins Portfolio

> Personal portfolio for Mark Galkins, full-stack developer based in Denmark.

## Canonical URL
- https://www.galkins.dev/

## Summary
- Mark Galkins builds clean, fast, and user-focused web experiences.
- Focus areas: React, TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js/Express, UI/UX, responsive frontend.
- Availability: freelance and full-time opportunities (CET timezone).

## Contact
- Email: marksgalkins@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/GR0UD
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/markgalkin/
- Dev.to: https://dev.to/gr0ud
- CodePen: https://codepen.io/GROUD-the-solid

## Portfolio Projects
- MyMoviez: https://github.com/GR0UD/mymovies
- Din Maegler: https://github.com/GR0UD/dinmaegler
- Tickets App: https://movie-ticket-app-burgerking.onrender.com/
- SwapHub: https://github.com/GR0UD/swaphub
- Portfolio: https://github.com/GR0UD/portfolio
